Get more done with whitepace

Project management software that enables your teams to collaborate, plan, analyze and manage everyday tasks

Try TasKey Free →

Project Management

Images, videos, PDFs and audio files are supported. Create math expressions and diagrams directly from the app. Take photos with the mobile app and save them to a note.

Get Started →

Work Together

With whitepace, share your notes with your collegues and collaborate on them. You can also publish a note to the internet and share the URL with others.

Try it now →

Use as Extention

Customise the app with plugins, custom themes and multiple text editors (Rich Text or Markdown). OR create our own scripts And plugins using the Extension API.

Let's Go →

Customise it to your needs

Customise the app with plugins, custom themes and multiple text editors (Rich Text or Markdown). Or create your own scripts and plugins using the Extension API.

Let's Go →

Choose Your Plan

Whether you want to get organized, keep your personal life on track, or boot workplace productivity, Evernote has the right plan for you.

Personal

$11.2

Keep home and family on track

  • ✔ Sync unlimted devices
  • ✔ 10 GB monthly uploads
  • ✔ 200 MB max, note size
  • ✔ Customize Home dashboard and access extra widgets
  • ✔ Connect primary Google Calender account
  • ✔ Add due dates, reminders and notifications to your tasks

Your work, everywhere you are

The app is open source and your notes are saved to an open format, so you'll always have access to them. Uses End-To-End Encryption (E2EE) to secure your notes and ensure no-one but yourself can access them.

Try Taskey →

100% Your data

The app is open source and your notes are saved to an open format, so you'll always have access to them. Uses End-To-End Encryption (E2EE) to secure your notes and ensure no-one but yourself can access them.

Whitepace teams up with your favorite software. Integrate with over 1000+ apps with Zapier to have all the tools you need for your project success.
